identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Transform a standard admin panel into a high-precision Audit Command Center.

typography.font_family_body: Inter, sans-serif (English) / IBM Plex Sans Arabic, sans-serif (Arabic)

rules: ALWAYS use logical properties for margins/padding: 'ms-' (margin-start) and 'me-' (margin-end) instead of 'ml-' and 'mr-'.
For flex containers that need direction flipping, ensure 'flex-row' is used (browser handles flip automatically with dir='rtl').
Icons in RTL: Chevron arrows must be flipped. Use 'rtl:rotate-180' class.

StatsCard.description: A dense card for high-level metrics (Contracts Screen)
StatsCard.structure: Flex row. Left: Icon with soft bg. Right: Value (Big) + Label (Small). Bottom: Trend indicator.
StatsCard.styles: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm p-6 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
StatsCard.path: Create new if missing or enhance existing Card component

StatusBadge.structure: span element with flex-inline, gap-2, items-center.
StatusBadge.styles: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

ActionRow.description: Horizontal list of icon-only buttons for quick actions
ActionRow.button_style: h-8 w-8 p-0 hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-500 hover:text-bayan-navy rounded-md transition-colors

DataListRow.description: A card that looks like a table row but has depth. Used for Forms/Quotations.
DataListRow.styles: group flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between p-4 bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg hover:border-bayan-navy/30 hover:shadow-sm transition-all duration-200 gap-4

forms_screen.title: Application Forms Management
guidelines: Visual Hierarchy: Client Name (Bold Navy) > Standards (Badge) > Date (Small Gray).
Actions: Group 'Copy Link', 'Email', 'View' into a distinct action area on the end side.
Add a 'Quick Stats' header above the list: 'Total Forms', 'Pending Review', 'Completed'.
Empty State: If no forms, show a professional illustration (use 'image_grid' abstract if suitable or clean SVG).

quotations_screen.title: Proposals & Price Quotes
guidelines: Use a 'Status-Grouped' layout or a clear table view.
Price Tag: Display price prominently (e.g., 'text-lg font-bold text-slate-900').
Timeline: Visual progress bar or step indicator for 'Draft -> Sent -> Accepted'.
Key Info: Organization Name, Contact Person, Standards (e.g., 'ISO 9001').
Primary Action: 'Create Proposal' button must be prominent (Bayan Navy).

contracts_screen.title: Signed Contracts Repository
guidelines: Top Section: 3 Stats Cards (Total Signed, Total Value, Recent Activity).
Main List: List of signed contracts. Each item shows Client, Date Signed, and a clear 'Download PDF' button.
Download Button: Use a red/gray icon for PDF to make it recognizable.
Filter: Add a simple text search or date filter at the top.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise on the sidebar background to reduce flatness.
visual_enhancers.gradients: NO gradients on cards. Only subtle top-down fade on the Dashboard background (#f8fafc to #f1f5f9).
visual_enhancers.icons: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width: 1.5px (Thin/Elegant).
visual_enhancers.animations: Staggered entrance for list items (Framer Motion or CSS keyframes).

login_bg.description: Modern blue glass building facade - suitable for login page background or subtle overlay.

empty_state.description: Clean abstract pattern for empty states or loading screens.

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Do not use standard HTML tables for complex lists; use Flex/Grid based 'Row Cards' for better mobile responsiveness.
Ensure all text has sufficient contrast (APCA standards).
RTL is paramount. Test by mentally flipping every row: Start becomes Right, End becomes Left.
